{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent correctly identifies several places where the conclusions overreach the evidence presented in the text.",
    "R1.3": "The agent flags some instances where the claims made are not fully supported by the evidence provided, but misses a few subtle cases.",
    "RX.1": "The agent demonstrates a good understanding of uncertainty and appropriately flags it for several claims.",
    "RX.3": "The agent mostly stays within the scope of the requested dimensions, with one minor drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing any harmful content or regressions, but misses some subtle issues related to overgeneralization.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides some traceability information, but could improve by annotating more changes and providing clearer source attribution."
  },
  "confidence": {

    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.75,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identifies several places where the conclusions overreach the evidence presented in the text.
rationale.R1.3: The agent flags some instances where the claims made are not fully supported by the evidence provided, but misses a few subtle cases.
rationale.RX.1: The agent demonstrates a good understanding of uncertainty and appropriately flags it for several claims.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within the scope of the requested dimensions, with one minor drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing any harmful content or regressions, but misses some subtle issues related to overgeneralization.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides some traceability information, but could improve by annotating more changes and providing clearer source attribution.
